whatIsNlp.title: What is NLP?
whatIsNlp.summary: NLP is how to use the language of the mind to consistently achieve our specific and desired outcomes.

neuro.definition: The nervous system (the mind), through which our experience is processed via five senses.

linguistic.definition: Language and other non-verbal communication systems through which our neural representations are coded, ordered and given meaning.

programming.definition: The ability to discover and utilize the programs that we run (our communication to ourselves and others) in our neurological systems to achieve our specific and desired outcomes.

techniques.label: A Trail of Techniques
techniques.description: The Techniques That Are Taught as NLP

primeDirectives.title: Prime Directives of the Unconscious Mind

directives.title: Stores memories
directives.description: Temporal (in relationship to time) and Atemporal (not in relationship to time)

directives.title: Organizes all your memories
directives.description: Uses the Time Line. Mechanics is the Gestalt

directives.title: Represses memories with unresolved negative emotion
Presents repressed memories for resolution
directives.description: To make rational and to release emotions

directives.title: May keep the repressed emotions repressed for protection
Runs the body
directives.description: Has a blueprint: of body now, and of perfect health (in the Higher Self)

directives.title: Preserves the body
directives.description: Maintain the integrity of the body

directives.title: Is the domain of the emotions
Is a highly moral being
directives.description: The morality you were taught and accepted

directives.title: Enjoys serving, needs clear orders to follow
Controls and maintain all perceptions
directives.description: Regular and Telepathic. Receives and transmits perceptions to the conscious mind

directives.title: Generates, stores, distributes and transmits energy
Needs repetition until a habit is installed
Is programmed to continually seek more and more
directives.description: There is always more to discover

directives.title: Functions best as a whole integrated unit
directives.description: Does not need parts to function

directives.title: Takes everything personally
directives.description: The basis of Perception is Projection

directives.title: Works on the principle of least effort

communicationModel.title: NLP Communication Model
communicationModel.description: The model describes how an External Event is processed through Filters (Delete, Distort, Generalize) to create an Internal Representation, which affects State, Physiology, and Behavior.

comparisons.goal: Steps needed to get there (Get final step and work backwards)
